# Atulya IT Solutions

Website: https://atulyaitsolutions.com

## Company Overview

Atulya IT Solutions is a digital technology company specializing in modern website development, WordPress solutions, Next.js applications, technical SEO, and performance optimization.

The company works with startups, small businesses, enterprises, and agencies to build scalable, search-engine-friendly digital experiences.

---

# Services

## Custom WordPress Development

Custom WordPress websites designed for performance, scalability, security, and ease of content management.

Capabilities:
- Custom Themes
- Gutenberg Development
- Elementor Development
- WooCommerce
- Membership Websites
- LMS Platforms
- API Integrations

URL:
https://atulyaitsolutions.com/services/wordpress-development

---

## Headless WordPress Development

Decoupled WordPress architecture using WordPress as CMS and Next.js as frontend.

Capabilities:
- WPGraphQL
- REST API
- Static Site Generation
- Incremental Static Regeneration
- Edge Rendering

URL:
https://atulyaitsolutions.com/services/headless-wordpress

---

## Next.js Development

Modern React-based web applications.

Capabilities:
- App Router
- Server Components
- API Routes
- Dynamic Metadata
- Structured Data
- SEO Optimization

URL:
https://atulyaitsolutions.com/services/nextjs-development

---

## SEO Services

Search engine optimization focused on traffic growth and lead generation.

Capabilities:
- Technical SEO
- On-page SEO
- Schema Markup
- Sitemap Optimization
- AEO
- GEO
- Core Web Vitals

URL:
https://atulyaitsolutions.com/services/seo

---

- Financial Services

# Technologies

Frontend:
- React
- Next.js
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

Backend:
- WordPress
- Node.js
- PHP

Database:
- MySQL
- PostgreSQL

CMS:
- WordPress
- Headless WordPress

Integrations:
- GraphQL
- REST API
- Stripe
- Razorpay
- WhatsApp API

---

# Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you build custom websites?

A: Yes. We build fully custom WordPress and Next.js websites.

Q: Do you provide SEO?

A: Yes. We provide technical SEO, on-page SEO, schema implementation, and content optimization.

Q: Do you support headless WordPress?

A: Yes. We build headless WordPress websites using Next.js and WPGraphQL.

Q: Do you provide website maintenance?

A: Yes. Ongoing maintenance and support plans are available.

Q: Do you optimize website speed?

A: Yes. We optimize Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, caching, and frontend performance.
